codeReview.summary: Pass. The commit is limited to Blue-driven reformatting of quantdb/extract_v2.py and test/test_extract_v2.py, with no semantic code changes detected and with handoff evidence that pre_commit blue and the full non-API pytest suite passed afterward.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker installed blue into the shared quantdb conda environment even though mission guidance forbids installing new packages without approval; the skill/environment guidance should steer formatter-only fixes to the existing pre-commit hook instead of pip installs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:16 says 'DO NOT install new packages without orchestrator approval'. The transcript skeleton for worker session 9cc8a185-eacd-4a16-a580-f70a3cca08dc shows '/Users/tmsincomb/miniforge3/envs/quantdb/bin/python -m pip install blue'. The repo already defines a Blue hook in .pre-commit-config.yaml:16-20, and the handoff notes that pre_commit's own Blue version reformatted the files before passing.

summary: Reviewed commit 9692546 for fix-extraction-formatting and found it satisfies the scoped validator-fix goal: both target files were reformatted only, pre_commit blue passed, and the documented full pytest run passed. No feature-scoped code issues found.
